summary.what: Document why separate commits for ledger entries is by design
summary.why: Anticipate user criticism of git log noise — the 'feature not bug' story needs proactive documentation
summary.how: Design decision in docs/, one-liner in prime output, note in log --help

notes: Two council rounds evaluated side-branch (rejected: clone gap, push regression), amend (rejected: <20% success rate, breaks filterLedgerOnlyCommits), and stage+flush (viable but unnecessary). Separate commits survived because filterLedgerOnlyCommits depends on the separation, and the noise is cosmetic — already mitigated for agents, trivially filterable for humans.
